title: selaginella rodriguesiana
intro: Selaginella rodriguesiana, also known as the Spiny Spike Moss, is a rare and unique species of evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella rodriguesiana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Selaginella rodriguesiana are typically dried and then used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
